_meta.woocommerce_notes: Each bookable session = 1 WooCommerce product (Bookings plugin). PAYG model: no term-block purchase for Tiddler. 'Book now' button links to individual session product. 'Book a trial' is the same product (every class IS a trial at £10). Tiddler Card (6-class stamp card) may be implemented as a WooCommerce voucher/subscription product.

class.name: Tiddler Gym
class.tagline: Parent & baby movement, music and play — a new circuit every week.
class.description_original: This class is designed to offer a fun environment for Parent/Carer and Baby, to encourage physical play & interaction between Parent/Carer & Baby using music, rolling, rocking, crawling & balancing in a safe friendly environment! The equipment we use is more specific to the Tiddler age range, tactile, bright and interesting to the younger age group and is set up in a different circuit each week. A chance for Parents/carers to have a chat and for babies to have heaps of fun!
class.description_redesign: A parent-and-baby activity class designed to encourage physical play and interaction between parent and baby. The tactile, bright and stimulating environment changes every week so there's always something fresh to explore.
highlights: Music, rolling, rocking, crawling and balancing activities
New circuit layout every week — always something fresh
Informal social time for parents and carers
No term commitment — pay as you go, or save with a 6-class card
class.location: Raynes Park Sports Pavilion, Taunton Avenue, London SW20 0BH

tiddler_card.note: Price not listed on original site — confirm with club

terms.label: Summer 2026
terms.price_per_class_note: Pay as you go — £10 per class

terms.price_per_class_note: Pay as you go — £10 per class

terms.price_per_class_note: Pay as you go — £10 per class

booking_table.note: No 'Book a trial' column for Tiddler — every class is PAYG so trial = standard booking. WooCommerce: each row maps to one bookable product (day + time slot). Availability to be pulled live from WooCommerce Bookings.
